_backend.label: Backend Master
_backend._notes: v0.5.2: top-level non-brand block. The UI offers this default as a placeholder for the Backend Master sheet picker; user input on the form overrides it. Keys prefixed with underscore are ignored by load_brands().

mapping.notes: SharePoint list ID. Engine never writes; blank on NEW rows.
v0.4.1 A4: Pantaloons source has no separate locality column; leave Location blank on refresh rather than duplicating Store Name. Pending Nivethitha confirmation (design doc Section 11.4).
Mirror of Store Id on every engine-written row.
SharePoint list ID. Engine never writes; blank on NEW rows.

SharePoint list ID. Engine never writes; blank on NEW rows.
TASVA brand constant (v0.5.1 F2; confirmed by Abhinay).

v0.4.1 B5: TASVA RM block. RM Name is col 7 (H). RM E-mail is col 8 (I) and RM Contact No is col 9 (J), swapped from the original reference per design doc Section 11.1. The adjacency-based duplicate-column resolver picks the nearest 'Email id' / 'Contact No' after the RM anchor automatically -- pending Nivethitha confirmation.
v0.4.1 B5: reads source col 9 (J) via adjacency to RM anchor (Section 11.1).
v0.4.1 B5: reads source col 8 (I) via adjacency to RM anchor (Section 11.1).

Source column at c29 carries the migration trail (e.g. '123456789, 11002' on a renamed/migrated row).  Cascade Step 2(b) tokenises this list and matches each value against in-scope Tasva Store Id / Legacy / Retek so a '11002 -> 67890' rename is classified as Migration (ID preserved, Title := new code, Old Sapcode appended) rather than falling through to NEW or ORPHAN.  Accumulating list; codes appended, never replaced.
Mirror of Store Id on every engine-written row.
